markdownRemark.html:
As salāmu ʿalaikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

Shaykh Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s class tonight (Sunday, Dec. 28th, 2008) is CANCELLED. We apologize for any inconvenience.

Please pass on this message.
